summary: Code quality refactoring sprint regression tests. Tested all auth flows (crew/contractor/admin login), rating routes (extracted to rating_routes.py), jobs, offers, profile, and key UI pages. All backend tests pass (14/15, 1 skipped due to no completed jobs without user participation). All UI flows verified via Playwright.

issues: Console hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <option>. Non-critical but worth fixing.

action_items: Minor: Fix hydration warning in JobFiltersRow.jsx — avoid wrapping option children in <span>
critical_code_review_comments: JobFiltersRow.jsx: <span> inside <option> causes React hydration warning (invalid HTML). Should render option text directly without span wrapper.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rating routes correctly extracted to /api/jobs/{id}/ratings and /api/jobs/{id}/rate. Auth token key is 'access_token' (not 'token'). All core flows working. sessionStorage key is 'punchlist_token'. The only minor issue is a React hydration warning in JobFiltersRow from <span> inside <option>.
